ModMetaData.name: RimTest Redux — Automated Testing Framework
ModMetaData.author: ilyvion, LaTrissTitude
ModMetaData.description: Finally we have unit tests for RimWorld modding! No more manual testing your mods on development, this mod automates the testing process by introducing a testing framework that allows you to test your mods in a simple and easy way. You can save your time and energy, let your computer do the testing for you.
